rationale.R1.5: The delegation directly requests restructuring the section flow, which aligns with structural reorganization at the section and subsection level, making it the load-bearing responsibility.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is not mentioned in the delegation and is out of scope for a pure restructuring task.
rationale.RX.2: Overclaim avoidance is not requested and not central to restructuring section flow.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is not explicitly part of the delegation to restructure flow.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is not referenced in the delegation and unrelated to section restructuring.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability are not requested in this structural reorganization delegation.
